name: Office.com (Web Version)
tagline: Free online Word, Excel, PowerPoint — works on any device
best_for: Anyone with a free Microsoft/Outlook account — no install required
steps: Go to office.com in any browser (Chrome, Edge, Safari, Firefox)
Click 'Sign in'. Create a free Microsoft account if you don't have one (any email works)
Pick the app you want — Word, Excel, PowerPoint
Create or open documents. Auto-saved to OneDrive (5 GB free)
notes: Web versions have ~80% of desktop features. Good enough for almost all student work.
